input.instructions: Search Physics StackExchange, MathOverflow, and HEP-related mailing list archives for discussions involving 'beta < 1/6' and 'B^2 formula' related to the Yang-Mills mass gap. Identify if these terms are linked to a specific controversial or critiqued proof and note the names of the authors being discussed.
